context: Push public repo with Magic MCP key: how to handle secret
rationale: picked recommended; security-conscious about public exposure

context: What to vendor for cross-machine portability
Personas: keep as prompts or convert to real subagents
Add a decision agent that learns user patterns
Use graphify globally across all workspaces?
rationale: installer writes invasive PreToolUse hooks+CLAUDE.md per project; staleness; small repos dont need it; keyless code graph is 90% of value; keep CLI binary global only

options: install non-team + cherry-pick, keep CSO as brain
chosen: install non-team + cherry-pick, keep CSO as brain
rationale: gstack fills CSO execution gaps (browser QA, security audit, canary/freeze, design, release); CSO keeps state/daemon/decision-maker; non-team avoids supply-chain auto-update risk

context: Integrate superpowers + claude-mem with CSO/gstack overlap
rationale: user goal=self-sufficient CSO; resolved overlap via one-owner-per-layer: CSO brain, superpowers methodology, gstack tools, graphify recon, claude-mem episodic memory, cso-learn curated

context: Cross-session context loss (state files persist but not conversation)
rationale: user flagged as breaker; built 3-layer continuity (auto+rich checkpoint+startup recap) deterministic, not dependent on claude-mem API
